targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ROUND((total_kb - free_kb) * 100.0 / total_kb, 1) AS "RAM Used %"
FROM ram_usage
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  usage AS "CPU %"
FROM cpu_usage
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  source_timestamp AS "time",
  tag,
  CAST(value AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS "Value"
FROM tags
WHERE $__timeFilter(server_timestamp)
  AND tag = '${tag}'
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  CAST(value AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS "Current Value"
FROM tags
WHERE tag = '${tag}'
ORDER BY server_timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  server_timestamp AS "time",
  status_code AS "Status"
FROM tags
WHERE $__timeFilter(server_timestamp)
  AND tag = '${tag}'
ORDER BY 1 ASC;

SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  CASE WHEN event = 'connected' THEN host_name ELSE 'Disconnected' END AS "Status",
  reason
FROM connection_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  timestamp,
  client_name,
  kind,
  reason
FROM opc_connection_events 
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  timestamp,
  event_name,
  source,
  message
FROM events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  name,
  status
FROM services
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (name)
  name,
  status,
  service_type,
  timestamp AS "Last Seen"
FROM services
ORDER BY name, timestamp DESC;

SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  usage AS "CPU %"
FROM cpu_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  interface,
  kb_bytes_sent - LAG(kb_bytes_sent) OVER (PARTITION BY interface ORDER BY timestamp) AS "Sent KB",
  kb_bytes_received - LAG(kb_bytes_received) OVER (PARTITION BY interface ORDER BY timestamp) AS "Received KB"
FROM network_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) 
  AND operational_status = 'Up'
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  timestamp AS "time",
  ROUND((total_kb - free_kb) * 100.0 / total_kb, 1) AS "Used %",
  ROUND(free_kb * 100.0 / total_kb, 1) AS "Free %"
FROM ram_usage
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tag FROM tags ORDER BY tag ASC;
list.label: Select Tag
list.name: tag

query.query: SELECT DISTINCT tag FROM tags ORDER BY tag ASC;
query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT tag FROM tags ORDER BY tag ASC;
